comments.author: markshannon
comments.body:
FTR, here's the reproducer on main without importing `glob`.
```Py
>>> def call(part):
...     [] + ([] + [])
...     part.pop()
...
>>> for _ in range(3):
...     call(['a'])
...
>>> call(list)
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
```

comments.author: ZeroIntensity
comments.body: I'm not going to trigger the noisy bot again, but this should be good to go.
